items.title: Trump Says Iran’s Response to Latest U.S. Proposal ‘Totally Unacceptable’
items.summary: The two countries have been discussing a 30-day extension to the cease-fire and a reopening of the Strait of Hormuz.
items.whyItMatters: It adds one useful signal to the current news mix without turning XLB into an overwhelming news feed.

items.title: Trump calls Iran response to US proposal to end war 'totally unacceptable'
items.summary: No details have been released of Iran's response - or the US proposals - designed to bring the war to an end.

items.title: Russia breaches three-day ceasefire with Ukraine, says Zelenskyy
